io.github.wooernico.kafka.sender

类 ReactorKafkaSender

  • java.lang.Object
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.sender.ReactorKafkaSender
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean, reactor.core.Disposable

    public class ReactorKafkaSender
extends Object
implements org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean, reactor.core.Disposable
